name: Stonekeeper
location: The Stonekeeper in Frostvault, Urgarlag Chief-bane

bonuses.stat:
When you Block, you gain an energy Charge stack. When you gain 6 Charges, you release the energy, restoring 57-2480 Stamina and Magicka, and healing for 57-2480. After releasing the Charges, you cannot regain new Charges for 14 seconds.

Charges can be accumulated up to once every .25 seconds.
